description: India Book I, 18a. Settlement (canceled draft) in the lawsuit between David ibn Sighmar, the representative of Moshe b. Labrat, against Yosef Lebdi. The final version of the settlement is preserved on the verso (I, 18b, PGPID 5387). The cancellation is marked by three vertical strokes.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
